title: InfernoF2
description: A lightweight and high-performance PvP texture pack designed for Bedwars and Fireball fights. Inferno16x brings fiery visuals, smooth FPS, and clean designs for the ultimate competitive experience.
body:
### Details 

infernoF2 is a custom Minecraft PvP texture pack made especially for Bedwars, Skywars, and fast-paced PvP combat. With its vibrant fireball textures, simplified blocks, and smooth weapon designs, this pack enhances gameplay while keeping FPS high for all players.

### ✨ Features:

🔥 Unique fireball and explosion effects

⚔️ Clean 16x PvP-friendly swords and tools

🧱 Simplified blocks for better visibility

🚀 Optimized for high FPS and smooth performance

🎮 Perfect for Bedwars, Skywars, and competitive PvP


### Version Support:

Minecraft 1.8.9 (PvP Optimized)


Perfect for players who want high FPS, clean visuals, and fiery PvP battles.
